content.text: I found the TUI is explicitly blocking all chat input and history/cursor editing whenever `app.state.processing` is true. I’m going to remove that hard lock so you can type the next message while a response is in flight, while still preventing Enter from submitting a second concurrent request.

warning: `codetether-agent` (bin "codetether") generated 79 warnings (2 duplicates)
    Finished `dev` profile [unoptimized + debuginfo] target(s) in 48.48s

content.text:
Fixed: the TUI no longer locks the input field while a response is processing.

What changed:
- You can now type in the chat input while the current request is running.
- Backspace/delete works during processing.
- Left/right cursor movement works during processing.
- Up/down history navigation works during processing.

What did not change:
- Pressing Enter while a request is already in flight still does not submit a second concurrent prompt.
- It still shows the status message: “Still processing previous request…”

Files changed:
- `src/tui/app/input.rs`
- `src/tui/app/navigation.rs`

Validation:
- Ran `cargo fmt`
- Ran `cargo check` successfully

Why it was broken:
- The TUI had `!app.state.processing` guards around nearly all input/edit/navigation handlers, not just submit.

If you want, next I can make Enter queue the next message automatically so it sends as soon as the current response finishes.
